title: Death's Scythe
description: Adds the "Reaper's Scythe", a weapon which one shots all enemies.
body: # Death Scythe Adds a new item, the "**Reaper's Scythe**": which can 1-shot all entities (including things like creative mode players). By default, the item is only obtainable through the "Combat" creative tab.\ Custom recipes can be added the usual way (via datapacks).
